---
title: "Análisis Univariado"
---


# Librerías

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import altair as alt
from vega_datasets import data
```

# Cargar dataset de `movies`

```{python}
movies = pd.read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/erickedu85/dataset/master/movies.csv")

movies.head()
```

# Single-Axis plot

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies).mark_point().encode(
    alt.X('runtime')
)
```

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies).mark_tick().encode(
    alt.X('runtime')
)
```

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('runtime', bin=alt.Bin(maxbins=30)),
    alt.Y('count()')
)
```

# Density Plot or KDE

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies).transform_density(
    'runtime',
    as_=['runtime','density']
).mark_area().encode(
    alt.X('runtime'),
    alt.Y('density:Q')
).properties(
    title='Movie runtime'
)

```

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies).transform_density(
    'runtime',
    groupby=['genre'],
    as_=['runtime','density']
).mark_area(opacity=0.5).encode(
    alt.X('runtime'),
    alt.Y('density:Q', stack=None),
    alt.Color('genre')
).properties(
    title='Movie runtime'
)
```

```{python}
density = alt.Chart(movies[:10]).transform_density(
    'runtime',
    as_=['runtime','density']
).mark_area().encode(
    alt.X('runtime'),
    alt.Y('density:Q')
).properties(
    title='Movie runtime'
)

tick = alt.Chart(movies[:10]).mark_tick(
    color='black',
    yOffset=145
).encode(
    alt.X('runtime')
)

density + tick

```
